title: The Reason for Flogging 'Isa b. Ja'far b. 'Asim and the Caliph's Role in This
description: and the Caliph's Role in This The reason for this was that seventeen men testified before Abu Hassan al-Ziyadi, judge of the Sharqiyyah [Quarter], against isa b. Ja'far to the effect that the latter had defamed Abu Bakr, 'Umar, 'A'ishah, and Haf^ah. Their testimonies reportedly differed in this regard.448

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
